steps.assistant_text: Unique-extern technique broke IDO's CSE collapsing of multiple &D_00000000 accesses. Three distinct externs (D_arc800_a, D_arc800_b, D_arc800_d) each declared as 0-aliased; D_arc800_a is shared between gl_func 1st-arg and chain-2 (0x6A8) base because target reuses one base across them. Bumps from 69% to 100%. Per feedback_usoplaceholder_unique_extern.md.

metadata.verification: Verified via objdump byte-diff: zero instruction differences vs expected/.o (size 128/128).
